answer:
<think> I know that Walter Lippmann was a journalist and author, best known for his columns and books on politics and social issues. H.P. Lovecraft, on the other hand, was a horror fiction writer, known for his works in the fantasy and horror genres. Both of them were writers, but in different fields. Therefore, I can conclude that both Walter Lippmann and H.P. Lovecraft were indeed authors. </think>
<answer> Yes </answer>
